series_metadata.series_title: PERRP Occupational Health Enforcement Investigations with Sampling
series_metadata.series_description: Enforcement investigations conducted by Public Employment Risk Reduction Program (PERRP) Compliance Safety and Health Officers (CSHO) as a result of public employee/employer complaints, exposure records, fatalities and other case files that involve PERRP industrial hygiene sampling data that requires analysis.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Scan ; Electronic: final abatement verification is received
